value: Thanks for reaching out, and I apologize for the delay on your refund. I've located your order (40690095999461967) and can see that the cancellation was processed. Refunds typically take 5–7 business days to appear back in your original payment method after cancellation, depending on your bank. If it's been longer than that, please let me know the cancellation date and I'll investigate further to make sure the refund goes through. In the meantime, feel free to reply with any other details that might help me track this down.
